fix_instructions: All issues have been resolved. The observability implementation is complete.

metrics_endpoint_security.description: Optional basic authentication can be configured via ServerConfig.BasicAuth

resolved_issues: MAJOR: FR-006 metrics endpoint security - IMPLEMENTED with BasicAuthConfig
MAJOR: FR-007 Grafana dashboards - 4 dashboards created
MAJOR: FR-008 Prometheus alerting rules - Comprehensive alerts.yml
MAJOR: FR-009 AlertManager config - Full routing configuration
MAJOR: FR-010 Docker Compose monitoring - All services in docker-compose.yml
CRITICAL: Services telemetry integration - All 5 services integrated
MINOR: Business metrics for notification and storage - Complete implementation
MINOR: normalizePath function - Implemented in middleware/metrics.go

grafana_dashboards: service-health.json - Service uptime, health status, error rates
request-throughput.json - RPS, latency percentiles, status codes
database-performance.json - Query performance, connection pool stats
business-kpis.json - Job metrics, auth metrics, storage metrics
prometheus_alerts: ServiceDown - Critical alert when service is down
HighErrorRate - Warning for elevated error rates
CriticalErrorRate - Critical for severe error rates
CriticalLatency - Critical for very slow requests
HighDBConnectionUsage - Warning for connection pool exhaustion
SlowDatabaseQueries - Warning for slow DB queries
HighAuthFailureRate - Security alert for auth failures
HighJobFailureRate - Warning for job processing issues
